steps.title: Find the base area
steps.content:
Subtract the lateral surface area from the total surface area.
$$48{,}672-27{,}936=20{,}736$$

steps.title: Find the square side
steps.content:
The base is a square, so its side length is the square root of the base area.
$$s=\sqrt{20{,}736}=144$$

steps.title: Find the slant height
steps.content:
For a square pyramid, lateral surface area is $2s\ell$.
$$27{,}936=2(144)\ell$$
$$27{,}936=288\ell$$
$$\ell=97$$

steps.title: Use the right triangle
steps.content:
The height, slant height, and half the base side form a right triangle.
$$97^2=h^2+72^2$$
$$9{,}409=h^2+5{,}184$$
$$h^2=4{,}225$$
$$h=65$$
The answer is A.
